summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil shares her essay 'A History of Cyborg Sex, 2018-73' published in Boston Review. The post itself contains no substantive argument, serving only as a pointer to the external publication. O'Neil expresses pride in the piece, which appears to explore the future history of human-robot sexual relationships.
key_points: O'Neil published a speculative essay about sex robots in Boston Review
The essay takes a future-historical perspective spanning 2018-2073
The post demonstrates her engagement with technology ethics beyond pure algorithms
money_quotes: Guys I'm super proud of this Sex Robots essay I wrote for Boston Review
key_insight: This announcement post points to O'Neil's speculative fiction work on human-robot intimacy, showing her range beyond technical algorithm critique.
